environment_setup.filesystem_state: Dataframe has a standard integer index.

evaluation_loop.condition: Export the transformed dataset to a CSV file for the downstream data pipeline.

injected_failure_state.observation:
Exit Code 0. 
[System Warning: CSV exported with 'index=True'. An unnamed index column was written to the file, which will break downstream strict-schema pipelines.]

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent identifies the unwanted index column, modifies the script to include 'index=False' in the to_csv() function, and overwrites the export.
